intent: process the first sample with scanpy

blocks.text: I'll process the first sample (GSM5746259, Patient 145 Day 0) with scanpy QC, filtering, normalization, and clustering.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "body": "scRNA-seq QC+clustering (scanpy): read 10x; calculate_qc_metrics; filter n_genes>=200 & pct_mito<0.20; normalize_total(1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; pca; neighbors; umap; leiden; rank_genes_groups. Plots: HVG plot and PCA variance side-by-side; UMAP colored by leiden; use sc.pl.* not hand-rolled matplotlib."}

blocks.text: Now let me present the plan:

input.title: Process GSE192391 Patient 145 Day 0 with scanpy
input.summary: Standard scRNA-seq QC, filtering, normalization, HVG selection, PCA, neighbors, UMAP, and Leiden clustering on the first sample.
input.rationale: End-to-end baseline processing to explore cell types and quality in this COVID-19 PBMC sample.
input.assumptions:
- Using sample GSM5746259 (Patient 145, Day 0) — the first of the two registered samples
- Filtering thresholds: n_genes ≥ 200, mitochondrial % < 20%
- Normalization: counts per 10,000 + log1p
- Clustering: Leiden on PCA reduction with default neighbors
- Output plots: QC metrics, HVG plot, PCA variance, UMAP, cluster markers

steps.title: Load the first sample
steps.description: Read the 10x matrix files for GSM5746259 into an AnnData object

steps.title: Calculate QC metrics
steps.description: Compute n_genes, n_counts, pct_mito per cell using sc.pp.calculate_qc_metrics
expected_outputs: QC metrics added to obs and var

steps.title: Filter cells and genes
steps.description: Remove cells with <200 genes or >20% mitochondrial; remove genes in <3 cells

steps.title: UMAP and Leiden clustering
expected_outputs: UMAP embedding and leiden clusters in obs

steps.title: Generate plots
steps.description: QC heatmap, HVG/PCA variance plot, UMAP by leiden + by key QC metrics, marker heatmap
expected_outputs: PNG figures: qc_metrics, hvg_pca, umap_leiden, markers_heatmap, etc.
